title: Tournament Assistant
description: A practical timeline for preparing, running and closing a tournament. Manual checklist, N/A bypasses and automatic checks when data is available.

toolbar.title: Keep the tournament under control
toolbar.description: Scan the current tournament, then tick what is done or mark non-applicable items.

sections.timelineHelp: Before, during and after the tournament. Mandatory items are the backbone; optional items add polish.
sections.scanHelp: Uses the SDK when available. Otherwise the item remains manual.
sections.eventsHelp: PoC buttons for actions that Compet+ will emit as domain events later.

identity.title: Confirm tournament identity
identity.description: Check name, code, dates, place and competition type before publishing anything.
identity.tooltip: Tournament screen → identity block / main information.

responsible.title: Declare the responsible judge
responsible.description: The organizer must know who validates the competition on the day.
responsible.tooltip: Tournament screen → Officials / Involved people → add the responsible judge.

faces.title: Order target faces
faces.description: Order or reserve the right target faces early enough. J-20 is a good safety margin.
faces.tooltip: Use the rule set / distance and target face configuration, then prepare the physical order.

awards.title: Order awards
awards.description: Cups, medals, goodies or vouchers. Optional, but organizers forgetting them become legends for the wrong reason.
awards.tooltip: External logistics for now. Later: Tournament → Logistics.

imported.title: Import or create entries
imported.description: The competition must contain archers before field assignment and scorecards make sense.
imported.tooltip: Registrations / Entries → import licenses or create archers manually.

assigned.title: Assign all archers
assigned.description: Every registered archer should have a target and position before printing scorecards.
assigned.tooltip: Field / Target assignment → drag archers to targets or run auto-assignment.

installed.title: Install the field
installed.description: Targets, distances, safety layout and waiting line are physically ready.
installed.tooltip: Field plan / printed layout. This is a manual physical check.

scorecards.title: Print scorecards
scorecards.description: Print sheets once target assignment is stable.
scorecards.tooltip: Print / Scorecards or Compet+ field/export actions.

chronotir.title: Recharge timing devices
chronotir.description: Recharge Chronotir / timing devices and check batteries. Future-you will say thank you.
chronotir.tooltip: Manual equipment check before the event.

backup.title: Create a backup
backup.description: Make a backup before competition day and before big result operations.

faced.title: Set target faces
faced.description: Install the correct target faces on the field before warm-up.
faced.tooltip: Use the field plan and target face configuration.

greffe.title: Prepare the registration desk
greffe.description: Check attendance flow, late entries, labels, payment list and who handles corrections.
greffe.tooltip: Registrations / Greffe workflow. Mostly manual for the PoC.

scored.title: Check scoring flow
scored.description: At least one score is entered and visible. Better to find data flow issues early than during awards.
scored.tooltip: Results or mobile scoring screen → verify entered qualification scores.

live.title: Enable live display
live.description: Optional, but useful for spectators, TV screens and sponsors.

checked.title: Validate rankings
checked.description: Check rankings, ties and obvious score mistakes before announcing results.
checked.tooltip: Results / Rankings → qualification ranking and tie checks.

export.title: Generate the FFTA file
export.description: Generate the federal export after validating final results.
export.tooltip: Export FFTA module → generate TXT export.

records.title: Check records
records.description: Look for broken or suspicious records and validate the record workflow if relevant.

archive.title: Archive the competition
archive.description: Final backup, result files, PDF outputs and internal notes are archived.

print.title: Tournament checklist
print.description: Paper version: visible checkboxes, full timeline and useful information for tournament day.

intro: This screen guides you from start to finish. Automatic checks run by themselves; tick the rest as you go, and print the checklist if needed.
